ddls:
CREATE TABLE "antennas" (
  "ant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each antenna */,
  "hole_name" TEXT /* Name of the hole where the antenna is located */,
  "ant_name" TEXT /* Name of the antenna */,
  "pol_type" TEXT /* Polarization type (e.g., kVertical) */,
  "ant_pol_num" INTEGER /* Antenna polarization number */,
  "daq_chan_num" INTEGER /* Data acquisition channel number */,
  "daq_trig_chan" INTEGER /* Data acquisition trigger channel number */,
  "ant_type" TEXT /* Type of antenna (e.g., kBicone) */,
  "ant_location_x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the antenna location */,
  "ant_location_y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the antenna location */,
  "ant_location_z" REAL /* Z-coordinate of the antenna location */,
  "cable_delay" REAL /* Cable delay setting */,
  "orientation_azimuth" REAL /* Azimuth angle of the antenna orientation */,
  "orientation_elevation" REAL /* Elevation angle of the antenna orientation */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of last calibration */,
  "calibration_status" TEXT /* Status of last calibration (e.g., passed, failed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_antennas_ant_type FOREIGN KEY ("ant_type") REFERENCES antenna_types ("ant_type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "ant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the antenna the sensor is associated with */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor used */,
  "calib_sensor_location_x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the sensor's calibrated location */,
  "calib_sensor_location_y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the sensor's calibrated location */,
  "calib_sensor_location_z" REAL /* Z-coordinate of the sensor's calibrated location */,
  "calib_cable_delay" REAL /* Calibrated cable delay setting */,
  "sensor_sensitivity" REAL /* Sensitivity of the sensor */,
  "noise_floor" REAL /* Noise floor of the sensor */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of last calibration */,
  "calibration_status" TEXT /* Status of last calibration (e.g., passed, failed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_ant_id FOREIGN KEY ("ant_id") REFERENCES antennas ("ant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "antenna_types" (
  "ant_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each antenna type */,
  "ant_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the antenna type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the antenna type */,
  "antenna_gain" REAL /* Gain of the antenna */,
  "bandwidth" REAL /* Bandwidth of the antenna */,
  "frequency_range" TEXT /* Frequency range of the antenna */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ant_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_acquisition" (
  "daq_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data acquisition setting */,
  "ant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the antenna the setting is associated with */,
  "daq_chan_num" INTEGER /* Data acquisition channel number */,
  "daq_trig_chan" INTEGER /* Data acquisition trigger channel number */,
  "daq_delay" REAL /* Data acquisition delay setting */,
  "sample_rate" INTEGER /* Sample rate of the data acquisition */,
  "fft_size" INTEGER /* FFT size of the data acquisition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("daq_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_acquisition_ant_id FOREIGN KEY ("ant_id") REFERENCES antennas ("ant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collected_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "ant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the antenna the data was collected from */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor the data was collected from */,
  "data_value" REAL /* Value of the collected data */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was collected */,
  "frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the collected data */,
  "amplitude" REAL /* Amplitude of the collected data */,
  "phase" REAL /* Phase of the collected data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collected_data_ant_id FOREIGN KEY ("ant_id") REFERENCES antennas ("ant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collected_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, engineer, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "perm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission is associated with */,
  "ant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the antenna the permission is associated with */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor the permission is associated with */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("perm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_ant_id FOREIGN KEY ("ant_id") REFERENCES antennas ("ant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_config" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system configuration */,
  "daq_setting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data acquisition setting used */,
  "antenna_setting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the antenna setting used */,
  "sensor_setting_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor setting used */,
  "system_status" TEXT /* Status of the system (e.g., online, offline) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_config_daq_setting_id FOREIGN KEY ("daq_setting_id") REFERENCES data_acquisition ("daq_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_config_sensor_setting_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_setting_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_config_antenna_setting_id FOREIGN KEY ("antenna_setting_id") REFERENCES antennas ("ant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_control" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "ant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the antenna the version is associated with */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor the version is associated with */,
  "daq_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data acquisition setting the version is associated with */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the system configuration the version is associated with */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_control_ant_id FOREIGN KEY ("ant_id") REFERENCES antennas ("ant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_control_daq_id FOREIGN KEY ("daq_id") REFERENCES data_acquisition ("daq_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_control_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES system_config ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_control_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)
